full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What is the primary baseline method that Kulis and Jordan compare DP-means against in their 2012 paper?

full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified by reading Section 3 and Section 5 — k-means is explicitly compared in experiments.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Finding a condition where DP-means fails to outperform k-means
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Under what specific conditions would DP-means NOT outperform k-means, based on the theoretical and empirical content of the Kulis Jordan 2012 paper?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested that when k is known and clusters are well-separated, k-means has lower per-iteration cost.
